## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) — or this PR doesn't touch a
      published package
- [ ] Affected packages listed in the summary
- [ ] Tests updated: `*.test.ts` for runtime behavior, `*.tst.ts` for type
      contracts (including intentional compile errors)
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing (`docs/content/`)
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` and `pnpm lint` pass locally
